subject: Koffing, a spherical floating gas-bag creature with a skull-like symbol on its body, drifting in toxic haze
description: Koffing is depicted in close-up, its dark purple spherical body bearing a prominent yellow-outlined skull-and-crossbones symbol. The creature floats within a hazy golden-orange atmosphere of gas and smog clouds. Small nubs or bumps are visible on the body's surface, contributing to its toxic, lumpy texture. The background haze is warm and murky, contrasting with the dark purple of the creature's body. The overall mood is hazardous and slightly eerie.
foreground: Koffing, spherical dark purple body with skull symbol and surface nubs
background: Hazy golden-orange gas clouds and smog atmosphere
